requirement.statement: AI runtime SHALL 通过 AI 领域 wrapper 采用 runtime control engine，将 mailbox、conversation、snapshot、tool/effect result、ingress 和 diagnostics 映射为 vendor 层 command、effect 和 durable head，并通过 depa-actor@0.2.0 CommandDequeGroup 表达内部 command worklist。

case.given: AI runtime 需要提交 human input、tool result 或 snapshot 相关操作
case.when: 业务代码调用 runtime-control 能力
case.then: 业务代码 SHALL 调用 AI 领域语义化 primitive，而不是直接拼装 vendor durable cohort 细节

requirement.statement: AI runtime SHALL NOT 用未独立验证的 runtime control engine 替换现有编排路径；替换前必须通过 vendor engine conformance tests 和 AI session recovery adoption tests。

case.given: runtime control engine 设计或实现已完成
case.when: 准备替换 AI runtime 的 session 编排和持久化路径
case.then: 系统 SHALL 先通过 crash recovery、dirty head classification、long-running effect wait 和 cohort commit 测试

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL map real AI session persistence sources into ai-runtime-control-composer durable heads before the composer can replace old runtime persistence.

suite.name: 真实 session head 映射

case.given: A session contains runtime snapshot, conversation files, actor transcript, mailbox state, ingress logs, and diagnostics logs
case.when: The runtime control composer prepares a checkpoint cohort
case.then: The system SHALL represent each source as a named durable head with sequence and buffered state
The system SHALL commit those heads only through a cohort commit marker

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL route real tool, MCP, bash, permission, questionnaire, and provider completion lifecycles through composer effect request/result commands before replacing old orchestration.

case.given: A tool output, async completion, or permission result arrives
case.then: The system SHALL require a matching effect request or classify the result as orphaned or dirty

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL classify real session directories using composer recovery rules and SHALL NOT silently resume dirty state.

case.given: A historical session has unpaired tool messages, duplicate human input, stale removed-tool calls, or inconsistent durable heads
case.when: The runtime loads the session through composer recovery
case.then: The system SHALL classify the session as orphaned or dirty unless a valid repair produces a clean cohort

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL run repeated replacement-readiness gap scans after implementation and SHALL extend this track until no remaining blocker prevents using ai-runtime-control-composer as the runtime persistence/control engine.

case.given: The planned implementation tasks are complete
case.when: A fresh gap scan compares composer adoption against old runtime responsibilities
case.then: The track SHALL record every remaining blocker as new tasks
The track SHALL NOT be considered complete until the scan reports no replacement blocker

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL drive concrete AI runtime file writes through ai-runtime-control-composer before claiming full replacement of the old runtime persistence writer path.

case.given: A runtime reaches a snapshot safepoint and has VM, actor, fiber, conversation, transcript, derived index, and manifest data ready to persist
case.then: The system SHALL enqueue a composer concrete checkpoint write effect instead of directly calling each concrete writer from RuntimeSnapshots
The composer SHALL execute the concrete writer support, read real session heads, buffer durable heads, and commit the checkpoint cohort in that order

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL treat ai-runtime-control as the owner of runtime consistency boundaries, with old concrete writers invoked only as support effects or explicitly classified projection/journal sinks.

case.given: A runtime reaches a snapshot safepoint
case.then: The system SHALL NOT write conversation, transcript, snapshot, manifest, or checkpoint-owned derived files before submitting the checkpoint to ai-runtime-control-composer

case.given: A provider, tool, permission, questionnaire, or async completion lifecycle event is observed
case.when: The runtime records the lifecycle event
case.then: The system SHALL submit the event through a runtime-control composer facade rather than directly writing runtime-control files from executor code

case.given: A session directory exists on disk
case.when: The runtime attempts to recover the session
case.then: The system SHALL run the runtime-control recovery gate before reading old snapshot repository data as support detail

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL provide an explicit irreversible session-file upgrade path before enabling owned-mode runtime recovery for old sessions.

case.given: An old session has valid runtime files but no runtime-control owned checkpoint
case.when: The migration runs the session upgrade
case.then: The system SHALL read real session heads, buffer those heads, commit the checkpoint cohort, and write an irreversible upgrade manifest

case.given: A session already has a runtime-control checkpoint marker but current heads or effect evidence classify as dirty or orphaned
case.when: The migration attempts to upgrade the session
case.then: The system SHALL reject the upgrade rather than overwriting the dirty state with a new marker

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL provide a single-session migration entry that can dry-run upgrade readiness without writes and apply an irreversible owned checkpoint only when explicitly requested.

case.given: An operator runs session upgrade without --apply
case.when: The CLI inspects the session directory
case.then: The system SHALL read upgrade marker, checkpoint marker, real heads, and effect evidence
The system SHALL output JSON classification, blockers, canUpgrade, and plannedHeads without writing files

case.given: An operator runs session upgrade with --apply
case.when: The session is already upgraded, dirty, orphaned, or otherwise blocked by effect evidence
case.then: The system SHALL return already_upgraded or rejected rather than writing a replacement checkpoint marker

case.given: An old session has no blocking evidence other than a missing checkpoint marker
case.when: The operator runs session upgrade with --apply
case.then: The system SHALL commit a checkpoint cohort, write the irreversible upgrade manifest, and verify recovery classification is clean

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL let users upgrade an old session from the TUI session picker before recovery, using the same runtime-control session-upgrade dry-run/apply semantics as the CLI.

case.given: A user opens the TUI session list and selects an old session that has no runtime-control checkpoint marker
case.then: The TUI SHALL ask the user to confirm the irreversible upgrade before applying it
The TUI SHALL call the same session-upgrade apply facade after confirmation

case.given: The selected session dry-run returns dirty, orphaned, or other blocking evidence
case.when: The user attempts to load the session from TUI
case.then: The TUI SHALL show the blockers and SHALL NOT navigate into the session route

case.given: The selected session is already upgraded and has a clean checkpoint
case.when: The user loads the session from TUI
case.then: The TUI SHALL load the session without asking for another upgrade confirmation
